summary: Health Monitor — include Audit Log Export job status panel
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want to see the Audit Log Export job status directly in the Connector Health Monitor dashboard, so that I can quickly assess whether compliance exports are completing successfully without navigating to separate screens.

**Background**

The Connector Health Monitor (F-A3) provides a centralized view of all data source connector statuses and their recent sync activities. Adding the Audit Log Export (F-B2) job status panel to this dashboard enables workspace admins to correlate connector health with compliance export completion in a single view.

**Acceptance Criteria**

1. The Health Monitor dashboard displays a new "Audit Log Export" panel showing the most recent export job status (Success, In Progress, Failed, or Not Run)
2. The panel includes the timestamp of the last export attempt and a link to view the full audit log export history
3. Status indicators use consistent color coding (green=Success, yellow=In Progress, red=Failed, gray=Not Run) matching other connector status indicators
4. The Audit Log Export panel refreshes automatically every 30 seconds, consistent with other Health Monitor panels

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Implementation complete. The Audit Log Export panel now appears in the Health Monitor dashboard alongside connector status indicators. QA verified all 4 acceptance criteria.
